subcodes.first_line: My spirit and my soul be a sacrifice unto Thee! From the intimations of the divine Words, this servant hath thus understood that in the Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی و نفسی لک الفداء از تلویحات کلمات الهیه چنان مفهوم این عبد شده که در ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital, @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
